data.title: Vendor Approval SOP
data.content:
# Vendor Approval SOP

A requester submits a vendor intake form. Procurement reviews risk, finance validates payment details, and legal reviews contract terms before approval. Approved vendors are added to the vendor master and reviewed annually.

data.title: Vendor Approval Workflow
data.mermaid:
flowchart TD
    intake[Submit vendor intake form]
    procurement_review[Procurement reviews risk]
    finance_review[Finance validates payment details]
    legal_review[Legal reviews contract terms]
    approval[Approve vendor]
    intake --> procurement_review
    procurement_review --> finance_review
    finance_review --> legal_review
    legal_review --> approval
